package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerSerializationMapAnyJsonDecodeInHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_serialization_map_any_json_decode_in_hot_path"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag JSON decoding into map[string]any in hot paths where typed structs avoid reflection churn."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
